articles.description: No Premier League, no Champions League, but Bruno Fernandes has won trophies, accolades and is on the brink of a record.
articles.title: Bruno Fernandes: How Man Utd captain won FWA award and got to brink of record - and what comes next?

articles.description: As the Premier League title race nears its conclusion, Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta tells his players and the Gunners fans to "stay present and live the moment".
articles.title: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta's Gunners face huge Premier League weekend

articles.description: Manchester City striker Khadija Shaw is crowned the Football Writers' Association Women's Player of the Season.
articles.title: Khadija Shaw: Manchester City striker named Football Writers' Association women's player of the year

articles.description: BBC Sport examines a torrid week for Real Madrid with the iconic club on the brink of a second successive trophyless season.
articles.title: Real Madrid in chaos: Inside the conflict at the Bernabeu

articles.description: Daniel Dubois will not to be drawn into a war of words after weighing in at a career-heavy 18st for Saturday's all-British heavyweight world-title fight against Fabio Wardley.
articles.title: Wardley vs Dubois: Daniel Dubois weighs in at career-heavy 18st for Fabio Wardley fight

articles.description: The EFL charges Southampton with spying on Middlesbrough before they meet in the Championship play-off semi-finals on Saturday.
articles.title: Southampton spying probe: Saints charged by EFL with spying on Middlesbrough

articles.description: AFC Bournemouth drop defender Alex Jimenez from their squad amid an investigation into posts on social media.
articles.title: Bournemouth: Defender Alex Jimenez suspended in club social media investigation

articles.description: Tommy Fleetwood shoots a four-under round of 67 to put himself within a stroke of the lead after the second round of the Truist Championship.
articles.title: Truist Championship: Tommy Fleetwood a shot behind leader Sungjae Im with Rory McIlroy in contention

articles.description: Former Chelsea and Man Utd boss Jose Mourinho in talks to become next Real Madrid head coach, Newcastle and Chelsea eye Uruguay Darwin Nunez, Wolves set to agree deal to sell Joao Gomes to Atletico Madrid, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Mourinho, Gomes, Vicario, Nunez, Openda

articles.description: Formula 1 bosses agree a change to engine design for the 2027 season in response to criticisms of the new power units introduced this year.
articles.title: F1 bosses agree to a change of engine design for 2027 season
